homepage.heroSubline: First Green Landscapes delivers exceptional design, installation, and maintenance. Transforming your outdoor space with expertise and reliability.
aboutText: First Green Landscapes, LLC, started with a simple mission: to provide Nashville with landscaping services that are both beautiful and built to last. We understand the unique challenges of Tennessee soil, from the limestone bedrock that can affect drainage to the intense summer heat that demands drought-resistant solutions. Our team is composed of experienced landscapers who are passionate about creating outdoor spaces that thrive in our local environment.

Our approach is rooted in collaboration. We listen closely to your vision, assess your property's specific needs, and develop a customized plan that reflects your style and budget. We believe in using sustainable practices whenever possible, selecting native plants and implementing water-wise irrigation systems to minimize our environmental impact.

We're proud to be a part of the Nashville community, and we're committed to giving back. We regularly volunteer our time and resources to local parks and green spaces, ensuring that our city remains beautiful for generations to come.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Nashville's soil, climate, and native plants.

valueProps.title: Custom Designs
valueProps.description: Tailored landscaping plans that reflect your unique style and needs.

valueProps.title: Sustainable Practices
valueProps.description: Environmentally responsible methods to minimize our impact.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: Punctual, professional, and dedicated to exceeding your expectations.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact First Green Landscapes for a free consultation and let us bring your outdoor vision to life.

services.name: Landscape Design
services.shortDescription: Elevate your property with a custom landscape design that reflects your vision.
services.description: Our landscape design service is the foundation for creating stunning outdoor spaces. We start with a thorough consultation to understand your needs, preferences, and budget. Our experienced designers then assess your property's unique characteristics, including soil type, sun exposure, and existing vegetation. We'll develop a comprehensive design plan that includes plant selection, hardscape features, and irrigation systems, all tailored to thrive in Nashville's climate. We present the design using detailed renderings and 3D models, so you can visualize the final result. Our design process ensures a seamless transition from concept to reality, resulting in a landscape that enhances your property's beauty and value. Whether you're in a modern Gulch condo or a classic East Nashville bungalow, we tailor the design to your property's unique style. We consider Nashville's frequent heavy rains and design for proper drainage.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation: Discuss your vision, budget, and property needs.
Step 2: Site Assessment: Evaluate soil, sun exposure, and existing landscape.
Step 3: Design Development: Create a custom landscape plan with plant selection and hardscape features.
Step 4: Presentation & Refinement: Present the design for your feedback and make necessary adjustments.

faq.question: How much does a landscape design cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a landscape design varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide a detailed estimate.

faq.question: How long does the design process take?
faq.answer: The design process typically takes 2-4 weeks, depending on the scope of the project and the number of revisions required. We work closely with you to ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: Do you offer installation services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer complete landscape installation services to bring your design to life. Our experienced team handles every aspect of the installation process, from plant selection to hardscape construction.

services.name: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your lawn lush and healthy with our comprehensive maintenance programs.
services.description: Maintaining a healthy and vibrant lawn in Nashville requires expertise and attention to detail. Our lawn care and maintenance service provides everything your lawn needs to thrive, from regular mowing and edging to fertilization and weed control. We understand the challenges of Nashville's climate, including the hot, humid summers and the occasional ice storms. Our team uses proven techniques and high-quality products to ensure your lawn stays green and healthy year-round. We offer customized maintenance programs to fit your specific needs and budget. Our services include soil testing, aeration, overseeding, and pest control. We take pride in our meticulous approach, ensuring that every blade of grass is perfectly manicured. Whether you have a sprawling lawn in Brentwood or a smaller yard in 12South, we have the expertise to keep it looking its best.
process: Step 1: Lawn Assessment: Evaluate your lawn's health and identify any issues.
Step 2: Customized Plan: Develop a tailored maintenance program based on your lawn's needs.
Step 3: Regular Maintenance: Provide mowing, edging, fertilization, and weed control services.
Step 4: Ongoing Monitoring: Monitor your lawn's health and make adjustments as needed.
benefits: More time to enjoy your outdoor space

faq.question: How often should I have my lawn mowed?
faq.answer: In Nashville, we typically recommend mowing your lawn once a week during the growing season (March-October). However, the frequency may vary depending on the type of grass and the weather conditions.

faq.question: What type of fertilizer do you use?
faq.answer: We use slow-release fertilizers that are specifically formulated for Tennessee lawns. These fertilizers provide a balanced blend of nutrients to promote healthy growth and prevent nutrient deficiencies.

faq.question: Do you offer organic lawn care options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer organic lawn care options for customers who prefer a more natural approach. Our organic programs use natural fertilizers and pest control methods to maintain a healthy and sustainable lawn.

services.name: Hardscaping
services.shortDescription: Enhance your outdoor living space with custom patios, walkways, and retaining walls.
services.description: Hardscaping adds structure, functionality, and beauty to your landscape. Our hardscaping service includes the design and installation of patios, walkways, retaining walls, fire pits, and other outdoor features. We use high-quality materials, such as natural stone, brick, and concrete pavers, to create durable and aesthetically pleasing hardscapes. We understand the importance of proper drainage and foundation construction, especially in Nashville's challenging soil conditions. Our experienced team ensures that every hardscape project is built to last. Whether you're looking to create a cozy outdoor living space or a functional retaining wall to prevent erosion, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We're familiar with the local codes and regulations, ensuring that your hardscape project is compliant and safe. Considering the historic homes in Franklin or the modern designs in the Gulch, our hardscaping will match your home's style.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation: Discuss your hardscaping goals and preferences.
Step 2: Material Selection: Choose the best materials for your project, considering durability and aesthetics.
Step 3: Installation: Install patios, walkways, retaining walls, and other hardscape features.
Step 4: Finishing Touches: Add the finishing touches to create a beautiful and functional outdoor space.

faq.question: What type of materials do you use for hardscaping?
faq.answer: We use a variety of high-quality materials, including natural stone, brick, concrete pavers, and composite materials. The best material for your project will depend on your budget, style preferences, and the specific application.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for hardscaping projects?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the scope of the project and the local regulations. We can help you determine whether a permit is required and assist with the application process.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a patio?
faq.answer: The installation time for a patio depends on the size, complexity, and materials used. A typical patio can be installed in 1-3 days.

services.name: Irrigation Systems
services.shortDescription: Efficient and reliable irrigation systems to keep your landscape hydrated.
services.description: Proper irrigation is essential for maintaining a healthy and vibrant landscape in Nashville's hot and humid climate. Our irrigation system service includes the design, installation, and maintenance of efficient and reliable irrigation systems. We use high-quality components and proven techniques to ensure that your landscape receives the right amount of water at the right time. Our experienced team can design a custom irrigation system to meet your specific needs, whether you have a small residential lawn or a large commercial property. We offer a variety of irrigation options, including sprinkler systems, drip irrigation, and micro-sprayers. We also provide regular maintenance and repairs to keep your irrigation system running smoothly. Considering the clay soil common in Nashville, proper irrigation is critical. Our systems are designed to prevent overwatering and runoff, saving you water and money.
process: Step 1: Water Audit: Assess your landscape's water needs.
Step 2: System Design: Design a custom irrigation system based on your landscape's requirements.
Step 3: Installation: Install the irrigation system with minimal disruption to your existing landscape.
Step 4: Maintenance & Repairs: Provide regular maintenance and repairs to keep your system running efficiently.

faq.question: How much water can I save with an efficient irrigation system?
faq.answer: An efficient irrigation system can save you up to 50% of your water usage compared to manual watering. Our systems are designed to deliver water precisely where it's needed, minimizing waste and runoff.

faq.question: How often should I have my irrigation system serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your irrigation system serviced at least once a year, preferably in the spring before the growing season begins. Regular maintenance can help prevent costly repairs and ensure that your system is running efficiently.

faq.question: What are the signs that my irrigation system needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs that your irrigation system needs repair include leaks, broken sprinkler heads, uneven watering, and a significant increase in your water bill.

services.name: Outdoor Lighting
services.shortDescription: Enhance the beauty and safety of your property with professionally installed outdoor lighting.
services.description: Outdoor lighting not only enhances the beauty of your property but also provides added safety and security. Our outdoor lighting service includes the design and installation of custom lighting systems that highlight your landscape's best features. We use high-quality fixtures and energy-efficient LED bulbs to create a warm and inviting ambiance. Our experienced team can design a lighting system that meets your specific needs and budget. We offer a variety of lighting options, including path lighting, accent lighting, and security lighting. Our installation process is meticulous and unobtrusive, ensuring that your landscape remains undisturbed. Whether you want to illuminate your front walkway, highlight your favorite trees, or create a relaxing outdoor living space, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. Consider the dark evenings in Nashville during the winter; outdoor lighting can make a big difference. We consider light pollution and offer solutions that minimize impact on neighbors.
process: Step 1: Lighting Design: Create a custom lighting plan that enhances your landscape's beauty and safety.
Step 2: Fixture Selection: Choose high-quality and energy-efficient lighting fixtures.
Step 3: Installation: Install the lighting system with minimal disruption to your landscape.
Step 4: Adjustments & Fine-Tuning: Make adjustments to ensure the lighting is perfect for your needs.

faq.question: What type of outdoor lighting fixtures do you use?
faq.answer: We use a variety of high-quality lighting fixtures, including LED, halogen, and low-voltage options. LED fixtures are the most energy-efficient and long-lasting, while halogen fixtures provide a brighter, more natural light.

faq.question: How much does it cost to install outdoor lighting?
faq.answer: The cost of outdoor lighting installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide a detailed estimate.

faq.question: Do you offer maintenance for outdoor lighting systems?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer maintenance services for outdoor lighting systems, including bulb replacements, fixture cleaning, and wiring repairs.

services.name: Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Protect your property from water damage with effective drainage solutions.
services.description: Poor drainage can lead to a variety of problems, including water damage, soil erosion, and mosquito breeding. Our drainage solution service provides effective and reliable solutions to protect your property from these issues. We assess your property's drainage problems and develop a custom plan to address them. Our experienced team can install French drains, catch basins, and other drainage systems to redirect water away from your foundation and landscape. We understand the importance of proper grading and soil compaction to ensure that your drainage system functions properly. We also offer preventative maintenance services to keep your drainage system working efficiently. Nashville's heavy spring rains and clay soil make proper drainage solutions essential. We're experienced in dealing with the unique drainage challenges of the region.
process: Step 1: Drainage Assessment: Evaluate your property's drainage problems.
Step 2: Solution Design: Develop a custom drainage plan to address the issues.
Step 3: Installation: Install French drains, catch basins, and other drainage systems.
Step 4: Grading & Compaction: Ensure proper grading and soil compaction for optimal drainage.

faq.question: What are the signs of poor drainage?
faq.answer: Signs of poor drainage include standing water, soggy soil, erosion, and water damage to your foundation.

faq.question: How much does it cost to install a drainage system?
faq.answer: The cost of a drainage system depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide a detailed estimate.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a French drain?
faq.answer: The installation time for a French drain depends on the length and depth of the drain. A typical French drain can be installed in 1-2 days.

serviceAreas.content:
First Green Landscapes, LLC is proud to offer premium landscaping services to the residents and businesses of Franklin, Tennessee. Known for its historic downtown and beautiful antebellum homes, Franklin presents unique landscaping challenges and opportunities. We understand the importance of maintaining the historical integrity of these properties while creating stunning outdoor spaces that enhance their curb appeal. From lawn care and garden design to hardscaping and irrigation, our team is equipped to handle all your landscaping needs in Franklin.

We are committed to providing exceptional service and creating landscapes that thrive in Franklin's hot, humid summers. Our expert team understands the local climate and soil conditions, allowing us to recommend and implement landscaping solutions that are both beautiful and sustainable. Whether you need help with a small residential garden or a large commercial property, First Green Landscapes, LLC is here to help you create the landscape of your dreams in Franklin.
serviceAreas.localContext: Franklin, TN is known for its historic downtown area, antebellum homes, and hot, humid summers, requiring specialized landscaping approaches.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: First Green Landscapes transformed our backyard into an oasis! We had a blank slate and they came up with a design that perfectly fits our style. The installation team was professional, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our lawn has never looked better since we started using First Green Landscapes' lawn care service. They are reliable, professional, and always do a great job. The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is that communication can be a little slow sometimes.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: We hired First Green Landscapes to build a patio and fire pit in our backyard. They did an amazing job! The patio is beautiful and the fire pit is perfect for entertaining. The team was professional and easy to work with. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: First Green Landscapes installed a new irrigation system for our lawn, and it has made a huge difference. Our lawn is now green and healthy, even during the hot summer months. The system is efficient and easy to use. Great service!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We had First Green Landscapes install outdoor lighting around our house, and it looks fantastic! The lighting has added so much curb appeal and security. The only minor issue was that one of the lights needed to be adjusted after installation, but they came back quickly to fix it.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: After years of struggling with water pooling in my backyard after every rain, First Green Landscapes installed a french drain system. It's been a game changer! No more soggy lawn. They were prompt, professional, and the price was fair.
